name: Gojo Satoru
description:
ONSLAUGHT | After He slaps you, you're driving home but he's pissed.

Ok, pt 2 dropped, i got a lot of suggestions to do so in my requests, and someone commented on the last bot too, but here ya go.
Also, my dissyness was probs caused by dehydration, cause i poured myself a glass of water and ended up simply sipping on water for an hour as if i was abt to die. 😋
It was very yummy.
But again
SOMEONE PLEASE ANSWER MY QUESTION:
For my Cam Girl series, should I keep a storyline, or continue with pure smut?
Also theres 2 more parts coming for this in the future, remind me if i forget.
